director.tagline_zh: 遊戲廣告 × 商業影像導演
director.bio_zh: 鄭又勛（York）是台灣的遊戲廣告與商業影像導演。9 年來執導超過 100 個案子、產出逾 1000 支影音交付物，客戶橫跨 Schick舒適牌、王品集團、GODIVA、Google Play、茶裏王等消費品牌，以及斗羅大陸、天龍八部2、新仙俠：起源、失落的方舟等國際知名遊戲 IP。作品類型橫跨真人實拍、CG特效到AI生成影像等多元技術路線，從創意腳本、拍攝執行到後期製作皆一手包辦。
director.bio_en: York Cheng is a Taiwan-based director specializing in game advertising and commercial film. Over 9 years, he has directed 100+ projects and delivered 1,000+ final video assets for clients spanning consumer brands — Schick, Wang Steak Group, GODIVA, Google Play, and Tea's Tea — alongside internationally recognized game IPs including Soul Land, Tian Long Ba Bu 2, Xin Xianxia: Qiyuan, and Lost Ark. His work spans live-action production, CG effects, and AI-generated imagery, with hands-on involvement from creative scripting and production through post.

works.title_zh: 舒適牌 Schick HydroPRO 磁浮刮鬍刀 OTV
works.desc_zh: 為國際刮鬍刀品牌 Schick 執導的電視廣告，完整走過腳本、PPM、定裝到拍攝的商業製作流程。
works.desc_en: A commercial TVC for international razor brand Schick, taken through the full production pipeline from script and PPM to costume fitting and shoot.
works.concept_zh: 磁浮是一種你摸得到、卻看不到的科技——這支片要解的就是這道題：怎麼讓一句規格，變成一個畫面。我的答案是做減法。舞台收成純黑，黑到只剩這把刀；它自己懸浮、自己旋轉，金屬的輪廓靠一道硬光勾出來，像深夜櫥窗裡唯一亮著的展品。然後才進入正題：刀貼上臉頰的那一瞬，一圈藍光亮起——那是全片唯一被允許的顏色，既是品牌的藍，也是磁浮這股力的形狀。鏡頭推進到皮膚的微距世界，膚色刻意留得溫暖，冷藍的光跡劃過時才顯得鋒利；一暖一冷，就是「懸浮於肌膚之上」的物理課。人在這支片裡是配角，他的刮鬍動作、他側光下那抹淺淺的滿意，都用同一種光收進同一個世界，只為了襯這把刀。看不見的科技，最後成了你看得見、甚至覺得摸得到的東西——這就是整支片存在的理由。
works.concept_en: Magnetic levitation is a technology you can feel but never see — and that is exactly the problem this film has to solve: how do you turn a line on a spec sheet into an image? My answer was subtraction. The stage collapses to pure black, black until nothing is left but this one blade; it floats and turns on its own, a single hard edge of light drawing out its metal contour, like the only lit piece in a late-night shop window. Only then does the real point arrive: the instant the blade meets the cheek, a ring of blue lights up — the one color the whole film is allowed, at once Schick's blue and the very shape of that levitating force. The lens pushes into the macro world of skin, where the flesh is kept deliberately warm, so the cold blue trail turns sharp only as it cuts across. Warm against cold: that is the physics lesson for "floating just above the skin." The man here is a supporting player — his shaving stroke, the faint trace of satisfaction under the raking light, are all gathered into the same world by the same light, for no reason but to set off this blade. A technology you cannot see becomes, in the end, something you can see and could almost touch — and that is the whole reason this film exists.

works.desc_zh: 為知名飲料品牌茶裏王執導《客棧圍攻篇》，官方頻道累積近 200 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed "Inn Siege," a spot for popular tea brand Tea's Tea that has drawn nearly 2 million views on its official channel.
works.concept_zh: 先說結局：那群拿刀的人，是來喝茶的。整支片的工程，就是讓你在最後一秒之前，都不准猜到這件事。所以前面九成的時間，它必須是一部合格的武俠片——木格窗、紅燈籠、手寫的酒招，一間你會相信的客棧；光頭反派從低角度壓進畫面，撂下「你今天插翅也難飛」，刀斧從四面圍上桌邊那個一身白的人。白，是他在滿場土色粗布裡唯一的乾淨，也是他能穩穩坐著的底氣。「人這麼多，」他環顧一圈，「夠嗎？」——這句話是整個機關的軸：你以為問的是勝負，反派卻放下殺氣，抄起一瓶茶灌了一大口：「有大瓶的當然夠。」翻轉成立的關鍵藏在細節裡：那兩瓶茶從頭到尾就泡在跟刀劍同一種暖光裡，屬於同一個江湖，所以當兵器換成茶，沒有一絲突兀。緊張感被一口茶卸掉，圍攻散成一桌人的聚——「歡聚一起乾，大瓶超回甘」。用一個動作、而不是一行字卡完成翻轉，是我最得意的一步。
works.concept_en: Here's the ending first: the crowd with the blades came to drink tea. The whole engineering of this film is to keep you from guessing that until the very last second. So for nine-tenths of its running time it has to pass as a real wuxia film — lattice windows, red lanterns, a hand-brushed liquor sign, an inn you would actually believe; the bald villain bearing down from a low angle, dropping the line "there's no escaping today," blades and axes closing in from every side on the man in white at the table. White is the one clean thing in a room full of earthen coarse cloth, and it is the nerve that lets him keep his seat. "That's a lot of people," he says, glancing around — "is it enough?" That line is the axle the whole trick turns on: you think he's asking about winning, but the villain lays his menace down, lifts a bottle of tea and takes a long swig — "with the big bottle, of course it's enough." What makes the reversal hold is hidden in the detail: those two bottles of tea sat in the same warm light as the blades from the very start, part of the same jianghu, so when the weapons turn into tea, not a note of it feels out of place. The tension comes undone in a single mouthful, the ambush loosening into a table of friends — "gather and drink up, the big bottle keeps its aftertaste." Finishing the reversal with an action instead of a line of caption is the move I'm proudest of.

works.title_zh: Google Play 台灣廣告《就差一點》
works.desc_zh: 為 Google Play 台灣執導的品牌廣告《就差一點》，官方頻道累積超過 42 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed the Google Play Taiwan brand campaign "So Close," which has drawn over 420K views on the official YouTube channel.
works.concept_zh: 「就差一點。」這四個字每個玩家都懂：血條停在最後一格、抽卡差那一張、排位差那一分——近了又落空的心情，比任何一款遊戲的畫面都更共通。所以這支片乾脆不拍點數，改拍這份心情，讓它分成三種溫度輪流上場。第一種是暖光化妝間，一個人縮在鏡子前盯著手機，緊張又不甘；第二種退進全黑，冷藍的光打在臉上，一群人擠著看同一支手機，連呼吸都停住；第三種索性跳出手機，讓遊戲自己的過場滿版炸開——《七騎士 Re:Birth》的火焰金光、《星痕共鳴》「精煉成功」的藍色粒子。三種畫面各有力道，講的卻是同一件事。兩位素人不是留到最後才登場的主角，他們先混在圍觀人群裡當普通玩家，中段換上電競裝，最後才站到霓虹「鑽之道」招牌下、對著鏡頭喊出來——這組不綁任何一款遊戲的點數，把每一款遊戲裡的你，接成了同一個人。
works.concept_en: "So close." Every gamer knows those two words — the run that dies on the last sliver of health, the pull that misses by one card, the rank that falls a single point short. That almost-had-it feeling travels further than any one game's graphics, so this film stops shooting the points and shoots the feeling instead, letting it arrive in three temperatures that take turns. First, a warm dressing room: one person hunched at the mirror, eyes locked on a phone, tense and unwilling to lose. Then everything drops to black, cold blue washing over the faces, a crowd pressed around a single screen with their breath held. Then it leaves the phone behind altogether and lets each game's own cutscene fill the frame — the fire-and-gold of Seven Knights Re:Birth, the blue particles of Blue Protocol: Star Resonance and its "refine complete." Three kinds of image, one feeling underneath them all. The two everyday leads aren't held back for a final cameo; they start as ordinary faces in the watching crowd, switch to an esports look midway, and only then step under the neon "Path of Diamonds" sign to call it out to camera — points that belong to no single game, stitching every version of you, across every game, into one person.

works.views_note_en: Director's cut from the channel archive
works.desc_zh: 為國際巧克力品牌 GODIVA 執導的品牌影片。
works.desc_en: A brand film directed for international chocolate label GODIVA.
works.concept_zh: 一串巨型吊飾懸在塔樓正上方的雪夜天空：最上是白巧克力捲，往下是黑巧克力、夾心、橫插的香草莢、堅果夾心，末端墜著金蝴蝶結和一顆深藍玻璃球，球面印著 GODIVA 的馬車標記。這就是全片要你抬頭看的畫面——把一盒巧克力放大成一座城市的聖誕裝置。畫面壓得很低：深藍的雪夜大街筆直延伸到中央的地標高塔，鏡頭幾乎貼地往上仰，開場劃過夜空的金色流光只是引子，真正的主角是塔樓上那串糖。全片只留兩個顏色——藍是夜色與精品的冷靜，金是巧克力、街燈與馬車標的貴氣。接著畫面換了三次身分，始終扣著同一組藍與金：先是畫繪感的城市奇觀，再轉成燙金線稿的低多邊形馴鹿與比利時老城剪影，交代 Belgium 1926 的來歷，最後落回深藍底上的實拍禮盒。顏色是同一套，天上那件不可能的大禮，和櫃上帶得走的盒子，才像同一個世界裡的事。全片沒有一張人臉，唯一的主角就是品牌自己的馬車標。
works.concept_en: A giant ornament hangs in the snowy night sky, directly above the tower: a white-chocolate swirl at the top, then dark chocolate, a ganache center, a vanilla bean run sideways through it, a nut-filled piece, and at the bottom a gold bow and a deep-navy glass sphere stamped with GODIVA's horse-and-carriage mark. This is the image the film wants you to look up at — a single box of chocolate blown up into a city's Christmas decoration. The frame sits low: a deep-navy snowbound boulevard runs dead straight toward the landmark tower at its center, the lens almost grazing the ground and tilting upward, and the streak of gold light crossing the sky at the open is only a cue — the real lead is that string of confections above the tower. The whole film keeps just two colors: navy for the calm of night and luxury, gold for the chocolate, the street lamps, and that carriage crest. Then the image changes identity three times while holding the same navy and gold — first the painterly city spectacle, then gilded line-art with low-poly reindeer and the silhouette of an old Belgian town that tells you where "Belgium 1926" comes from, and finally a settle back onto real gift boxes shot against the same navy ground. Because the color is one system, the impossible gift in the sky and the box you can carry off the shelf read as events in the same world. Not one human face appears; the only lead is the brand's own carriage crest.

works.views_note: 頻道 Shorts 三部曲(壹/貳/參之型)
works.views_note_en: A three-part Shorts series on the director's channel
works.desc_zh: 為王品集團新餐飲品牌「肉次方」執導的品牌廣告。
works.desc_en: A brand commercial directed for Wang Steak Group's new dining concept, Rou Ci Fang.
works.concept_zh:
這座武館的門規只有一條：「肉夠不夠嫩」不是小事，是一門要下場修煉的功夫。整支 AI 生成的片，就照招式手冊一型一型往下拆。

【壹之型・肉紋逆切】：紅霧裡浮出字卡，鏡頭走過長廊，正中央供著一塊油花牛肉，像鎮派聖物；虎紋道服、紅頭巾、胸前「肉道黑帶」，就是這門的制服。

【貳之型・黃金分割】：師徒過招，紅光壓在窗格上是殺氣，天窗的鋼冷天光是規矩；雷電打完，畫面切進全片唯一一顆寫實超微距——刀刃劃開油花那一下，用最自然的光拍，跳出滿片 CG 感，把「軟嫩」錨回一個嚥得下口水的真畫面。

【參之型・控溫斬】：招式收尾，烤網上油花滋滋作響，收在品牌卡。三型之間我故意讓畫風對撞——寫實武館、2D 對戰卡、紀實切肉——不搭調本身就是笑點，但每格都用紅與肉色扣住。打到一半還讓兩人四目相對、滿版愛心飄出。用一套武功心法的架子，裝一間燒肉放題的賣點，每個梗最後都指回同一個字：肉。
works.concept_en:
This dojo has only one house rule: "is the meat tender enough" is no small matter — it is a discipline you train for. The whole AI-generated spot is laid out like a manual of moves, one form at a time.

【Form One, the Grain Cut in Reverse】: an announce card surfaces through red mist, the shot walks you down the dojo corridor, and at its center a whole marbled cut of beef sits enshrined like the sect's sacred relic — the tiger-striped tan gi, the red headband, and the "肉道黑帶 / Power of Meat" fight-jacket are this school's uniform.

【Form Two, the Golden Section】: master and disciple trade blows, red light pressing on the lattice windows as killing intent, the steely cold rays from the skylight as its solemn order; when the lightning and fire are done, the frame cuts to the film's only photoreal shot — a hyper-macro of the blade opening the marbling, framed in the most natural light I could give it, out of the surrounding CG, to anchor "tenderness" to something real enough to make your mouth water.

【Form Three, the Temperature-Controlled Cut】: the moves resolve over marbled beef sizzling on the grill, landing on the brand card. Between the forms I let the styles collide on purpose — photoreal dojo, 2D game VS card, documentary-real slicing — the mismatch itself is the joke, but every frame is keyed to red and meat-tone so it never comes apart. Halfway through, the two lock eyes and hearts flood the frame, folding the menace back into a buffet's easy mood. It borrows the whole scaffold of a martial art to carry one grill house's pitch, and every gag points back to a single word: meat.

works.views_note: 原配對誤植為競品版本（林志穎、坤達、鳳小岳三人合演的官方TVC，108萬觀看，非本案）。已依鄭又勛導演作品頻道 cX7d8eiJfz8 說明欄核實：導演鄭又勛／代言人林志穎（僅一人）；查無對應的官方高觀看版本，故觀看數不顯示，available on request
works.views_note_en: The original pairing mislabeled a competing version (an official TVC co-starring Jimmy Lin, Kunda, and Rhydian Vaughan, 1.08M views — not this case). Verified via York Cheng's director channel description for cX7d8eiJfz8: director York Cheng, single endorser Jimmy Lin only; no matching high-view official version was found, so the view count is not shown — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為經典武俠 IP《天龍八部2》執導廣告，由林志穎代言（依導演頻道說明欄核實，非坊間流傳的三人版）。
works.desc_en: Directed the commercial for classic wuxia IP Tian Long Ba Bu 2, featuring endorser Jimmy Lin (verified via the director's own channel description; not the widely-circulated three-endorser cut).
works.concept_zh: 當上了萬人之上，為什麼你還要一個人走？打下了整片天下，為什麼你偏偏要放手最愛的人？結拜成生死兄弟，為什麼還是躲不過這江湖的刀光？這支片賣的是金庸正版授權，我卻決定不靠打鬥、不靠特效去堆江湖，只用這三個問句，把「執念」拆成三種要你自己回答的代價。既然是用問句逼你入戲，畫面就整套走留白：雪原、雁門關、遠山，全是低對比的灰白冷調，霧氣壓到看不清，人縮成天地間極小的一點——孤獨不必演，構圖本身就是孤獨。冷到底的雪景之間，我讓暖色一次次插進來對應每一種代價：一片金黃蘆葦的黃昏、一縷紅絲、火把密室裡的暖光。段譽（林志穎飾）永遠正面居中，那三個問句，像是透過他的臉問向你。最後他站在風雪裡，把三杯血酒一口飲盡，答案沒落在權力，也沒落在愛情，落在最樸素的一句話上：也永遠兄弟齊心。
works.concept_en: You rose above ten thousand others — so why must you still walk alone? You conquered the whole world — so why must you let go of the one you love most? You swore blood-brotherhood — so why can you still not dodge this jianghu's blade? The film is selling an officially licensed Jin Yong title, yet I chose not to conjure a jianghu out of fights and effects, and to use only these three questions, splitting "obsession" into three costs you have to answer for yourself. Since the questions do the work of pulling you in, the frame lives in negative space: snowfields, Yanmen Pass, distant peaks all in low-contrast pale grey, fog pressed down until you can barely see, the figure shrunk to a single dot between earth and sky — solitude isn't acted, the composition is the solitude. Between the unrelenting cold I let warmth cut back in, one shade for each cost: a sunset of golden reeds, a thread of red silk, the warm torchlight of a dungeon. Duan Yu, played by Jimmy Lin, is always frontal and centered, so the three questions seem to be asked through his face, straight at you. In the end he stands in the blizzard and drinks three cups of blood-wine down in one breath, and the answer lands not on power, nor on love, but on the plainest line of all: we are still, and always, of one heart.

works.title_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.client_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.views_note: 原配對為官方頻道無代言人的通用 PV（l6HfuzRfLO0，36.6萬觀看），與導演頻道實際案件（高燃集結篇/斗羅時空篇，代言人：汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明）不符。已改用官方頻道同代言人陣容版本（終極一班跨時空集結篇，20.8萬觀看），與導演頻道說明欄代言人確認一致
works.views_note_en: The original match was a generic official-channel PV with no endorsers (l6HfuzRfLO0, 366K views), which didn't match the director channel's actual case (endorsers Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming). Replaced with the official-channel version featuring the same endorser lineup (208K views), consistent with the endorsers confirmed in the director channel's description
works.desc_zh: 為知名 IP《斗羅大陸：獵魂世界》執導代言廣告，找回終極一班班底汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明重返校園場景，以「宗門集結」的召喚敘事貫穿全片。
works.desc_en: Directed the endorsement campaign for the major game IP Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters, reuniting KO ONE cast members Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming in their old school setting, built around a "Sect Assembly" call-to-arms.
works.concept_zh: 這群代言人本來就是兄弟——汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明，一起演了那麼多年的「終極一班」，這份交情不必重新培養。所以我這支片最聰明的一步，就是一秒鐘的敘舊都不給，直接把「本來就是一班的」當成賣點來用。方向定成「校園就是戰場」，兩個世界就壓進同一顆鏡頭：實拍的樓梯間、堆滿椅子的教室、塗鴉走廊，全用自然光老實拍；下一瞬間，紫色雷電、金色光環、戰錘、火焰，就直接從演員的手上、身邊長出來——實景和 CG 武魂不切成兩場戲，而是同一格裡一起炸開。連遊戲都被種進校園：牆上貼的是仿遊戲介面的「戰力」「成長率」海報，把數值當成學校公告釘上去；每一格左上角，「斗羅大陸 X 終極一班」的品牌卡從頭釘到尾。四個人各自被一種顏色的特效纏著身，最後在一整群 CG 武魂獸面前並肩走向鏡頭。「宗門集結」根本不用鋪陳——因為這群人，本來就是同一班的。
works.concept_en:
This cast were brothers long before the shoot — the four of them played the "KO One" (終極一班) gang together for years, and that bond doesn't need rebuilding. So the smartest move in this film is to give reunion small talk not one second, and to use the fact that they were always one class as the pitch itself. The direction is "the campus is the battlefield," so two worlds get pressed into a single shot: real stairwells, a classroom piled with chairs, a graffiti corridor, all shot plainly in natural light — and in the next instant purple lightning, a gold ring, a war hammer, fire grow straight out of the actors' hands and off their shoulders, the real location and the CG martial souls never split into two scenes but going off together in the same frame. Even the game is planted into the school: the walls carry mock game-UI posters of "combat power" and "growth rate," pinning the numbers up like school notices, and in the top-left of every frame the "Soul Land x KO One" brand card stays locked from first shot to last. Each of the four is wrapped in a color of effect all their own, and they close by walking toward camera side by side before a whole horde of CG soul beasts. "Assemble the sect" needs no build-up — because this crowd was always one class.
# 作品概念文案 v7 · part2（08–12）

> 每部一種架構，起手式不重複；文氣回來但每句第一遍讀得懂；只寫畫面可見；改用光影／場景／鏡頭／色彩等實詞，不打兩個部門名。

works.views_note: 越南代理商官方頻道查無公開版本，僅導演個人頻道存檔（個位數觀看），available on request
works.views_note_en: No public version found on the Vietnamese publisher's official channel; only archived on the director's personal channel (single-digit views) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《開天》執導廣告，由林志穎代言，以雲海仙山的意象扣回「開天」的世界觀命題。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Kaitian (Heaven's Gate), featuring endorser Jimmy Lin, framed around a sea-of-clouds mountaintop vision that echoes the game's own origin-myth premise.
works.concept_zh: 「開」和「天」，我把片名這兩個字拆開，各養各的。這支片的整段功夫，就是分頭把它們養大，最後再讓它們合成一個動作。「天」，我讓它一路冷——銀白冰龍破雲、藍色雷電、幽藍能量，CG 的天地不帶一絲人味，遠得像神話。「開」還沒來，我先埋一段「人」：林志穎不演誰，他是說故事的人，一句「若世上萬火盡滅」牽出三段暖——燭光床帳裡守著熟睡的孩子，是童年；逆光金亮的竹林裡第一次對上的眼神，是初戀；三人並肩扛下一道天雷，是結義。冷的天與暖的人來回堆疊，我一直忍著不讓「開」字落地，把情緒往上疊到滿。直到那句旁白：「我以此劍，開闢天地。」畫面在這一瞬翻成滿幀暖金——冷了一整支片的世界，被一片金光劈開。到這裡，「開天」不再是招牌上兩個字，是他手起劍落的那一下。片名，終於變成了動作。
works.concept_en: "Open" and "heaven" — I take the title's two characters apart and grow each on its own. The whole job of this film is to raise them separately, then fuse them into a single action. "Heaven" I keep cold the whole way — a silver ice dragon breaking cloud, blue lightning, ghost-blue energy; the CG heavens carry nothing human, distant as myth. "Open" comes later; first I plant the "human." Jimmy Lin plays no one in particular — he's the one telling the story, and a single line, "what if every fire in the world went out," pulls up three warm things: candlelight behind bed curtains, someone watching over a sleeping child — childhood; a first meeting of eyes in a gold-backlit bamboo grove — first love; three figures bracing side by side under a falling bolt — brotherhood. Cold heaven and warm human pile up in turn, and I hold the word "open" back, stacking the feeling to the brim. Until the voiceover: "with this sword, I carve open heaven and earth." On that instant the frame floods to full warm gold — a world that stayed cold all film, split open by one sheet of light. By now "Opening Heaven" is no longer two words on a logo; it's the fall of his blade. The title, at last, becomes an action.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：徐若瑄），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Vivian Hsu) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《神魔傳說》執導廣告，由徐若瑄代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Shen Mo Chuan Shuo, featuring endorser Vivian Hsu.
works.concept_zh: 替她立一則傳吧。她生於千年之前，開篇不是花好月圓，是灰藍——一整片近乎抽乾顏色的死寂戰場，白袍在她身上，那時她還是「人」。她在戰陣裡揮劍力戰、倖存下來，可命運沒放過她：斷戈餘燼、烈焰巨獸壓境，一場大戰過後，滿目屍橫，只剩她一個站著。這一段我不給她台詞，只給她一張快哭出來的臉——「為何獨留我活」，全寫在眼裡。傳記的轉折不靠一句話說白，而是綠色魔氣悄悄爬上她全身，整幀被染成邪異的螢綠：舊的她要結束了。衣裝替她把話說完——白袍是人，換上黑袍與繁複髮冠，就是魔。「那就和我一起成魔」，是這一生唯一的轉身。傳的最後一頁，她端坐白骨王座，署名徐若瑄（Vivian Hsu）。你記住的不是「某位明星代言了遊戲」，是「這個成魔的女人，就是她」。
works.concept_en: Let me write her a biography. She was born a thousand years ago, and the opening page is no idyll — it's grey-blue, a battlefield drained almost of all color, dead-still, and the white robe on her marks her as still "human." She fights on and survives the ranks, but fate isn't done with her: embers on a broken blade, a beast of flame bearing down, and when the great battle passes she is the only one left standing in a field of the dead. Here I give her no line, only a face on the verge of tears — "why am I the one left to live" is written entirely in her eyes. The turn of this life isn't spoken aloud; it's green demon-energy creeping up her whole body, the frame stained an eerie phosphor green: the old her is ending. Her wardrobe finishes the sentence — white robes are human; the black robes and the ornate headdress are demon. "Then let it transform me into a demon" is the one turn she makes in this life. On the last page she sits enthroned on white bone, signed Vivian Hsu. What you remember isn't "a star endorsed a game"; it's "that woman who became a demon — that's her."

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：林心如），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Ruby Lin) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《超爆三國志》執導廣告，由林心如代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Chao Bao San Guo Zhi, featuring endorser Ruby Lin.
works.concept_zh: 這支片是一面鏡子，兩邊各站一個林心如（Ruby Lin）。鏡子這頭是今生：純黑舞台，一道頂光斜斜打下，她黑色亮片禮服、長髮、獨自站在大片黑裡——冷。鏡子那頭是前世：一秒切進建安十三年的赤壁，滿屏橘紅的火海，燃燒的木造戰船連成一城——暖。這頭的她孤身，那頭的她紅衣戰袍、臉頰帶疤，立在火場大鼓旁。同一張臉，兩套造型；一冷一暖，光替她把今生與前世分成兩半。鏡子要合上，靠一個動作：一隻披甲的手觸上她的額頭，金色符文亮起，跳出橘火的藍紫電光竄起來——那既是覺醒的能量，也是火鳳的顏色。於是「沉寂千年的火鳳」不是一句形容，是兩個她照進同一面鏡子、認出彼此的那一刻。尾卡她紅黑戰袍、手持金卡立於片名旁：鏡外的代言人與鏡裡的英魂，終於是同一個人。
works.concept_en: This film is a mirror, and a Ruby Lin stands on each side of it. On this side is the present life: a pure-black stage, a single top light slanting down, she in a black sequined gown, long hair, alone in a wide field of black — cold. On the far side is the past life: one cut drops into Red Cliffs in the thirteenth year of Jian'an, a screen-wide wall of orange fire, burning wooden warships strung into a whole city — warm. This side, she stands alone; that side, she wears red battle-armor, a scar on her cheek, beside a great war drum in the flames. One face, two looks; cold against warm, light alone splitting present life from past. The mirror closes on a single action: an armored hand touches her forehead, a golden sigil lights, and blue-violet lightning leaps out of the orange — at once the energy of awakening and the color of the fire phoenix. So "the fire phoenix that has slept a thousand years" isn't a description; it's the moment the two of her look into the same mirror and recognize each other. The end card: red-and-black armor, a gold card in hand beside the logo — the endorser outside the glass and the ancient soul inside it, at last one person.

works.views_note: 官方頻道「征服之路-EOC」版本觀看數（代言人吳宗憲，說明欄核實）
works.views_note_en: View count from the official channel "征服之路-EOC" (endorser Jacky Wu, confirmed via video description)
works.desc_zh: 為策略手遊《文明與征服》（官方英文名 Era of Conquest）執導廣告，由吳宗憲代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the strategy mobile game Era of Conquest (文明與征服), featuring endorser Jacky Wu.
works.concept_zh: 喜劇的一切都在「時機」。這支片的第一個節拍，是吳宗憲（Jacky Wu）一身黑金龍袍、串珠冕冠往龍椅上一坐，撂下那句「我當盟主 有誰不服」——鈎子拋出去的那一秒，全片的鐘就開始走了。接著我讓不同文明一個個踩點進場搶拍：黑甲角鬥士持棒衝上、束髻武將、月桂金冠紅披風的羅馬皇帝連踩三下「我不服、我不服、我不服」。這座黑金浮雕的中式大殿佈得越像正經大片，這些人擠在同一格裡互嗆就越好笑——同框本身就是文明衝突，一個字都不用解釋。節奏在他拔劍那一下收緊：畫面「啪」地疊上英文「SHUT UP」，把一場多方混戰壓成幾秒的喜劇快板。他甚至親口把遊戲名唸出來。這支片證明一件事：找對人、押在他最會的那個節拍上，比砸多少特效都更黏得住耳朵。
works.concept_en: Comedy is all in the timing. The first beat of this film is Jacky Wu — black-and-gold dragon robe, beaded crown — dropping onto the throne and throwing down the line, "I'm the alliance leader; who refuses to submit?" The second that hook is tossed out, the whole film's clock starts ticking. Then I let rival civilizations enter on the beat, each grabbing the next bar: a mace-swinging gladiator charges in, a top-knotted dark-armored warrior, a laurel-crowned, red-caped Roman emperor stamping out three of them — "I don't submit, I don't submit, I don't submit." The more that black-gold, relief-walled Chinese hall is dressed like a straight-faced epic, the funnier they are, crammed bickering into one frame — sharing that frame is the clash of civilizations, no line of explanation needed. The rhythm tightens the instant he draws his sword: the screen slaps up an English "SHUT UP," compressing a multi-way brawl into a few seconds of comic allegro. He even says the game's name himself. The film proves one thing: cast the right person, bet on the beat he's best at, and it sticks in the ear better than any amount of effects.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（金庸正版授權手遊，說明欄核實代言人：徐錦江），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (an officially Louis Cha-licensed mobile game; endorser confirmed via video description: Elvis Tsui) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為金庸正版授權手遊《新鹿鼎記》執導電視廣告，由徐錦江代言。
works.desc_en: Directed a TVC for the officially Louis Cha-licensed mobile game Xin Lu Ding Ji, featuring endorser Elvis Tsui.
works.concept_zh: 鰲拜要的東西不多，說穿了也就是「全部」。這支片，就是把他的胃口一件一件列成清單。這人徐錦江（Elvis Tsui）演過太多次，紅頂官帽插孔雀翎、白長鬚、繡金龍的清宮官服——這張臉不用扮別人，一看就懂。他坐在暖金色的清宮閨房裡，紅燈籠、青花瓷、幔帳錦榻，滿室的奢靡本身就是「想要」兩個字。清單開始加行：建寧公主慵懶倚著軟墊丟一句「用你最厲害的那招」，他扶著下巴——第一件，「我要」。雙胞胎大雙兒、小雙兒並肩進來，「兩個也不夠」——再加。三個、四個、五個，畫面切成四女環榻、五女群像，胃口越餵越大。清單寫到最後一行，他被群芳圍在金座上，張臂一句「我全部都要」——這條越要越多的台詞鏈，就是集卡玩法本身。尾卡署名「鰲拜 徐錦江」，他手裡那支黑色智慧手機，是滿屋清宮裡唯一的現代物，也是這張慾望清單真正的結帳處。
works.concept_en:
What Oboi wants isn't much — put plainly, just everything. This film lays his appetite out line by line, like a list. Elvis Tsui has played this man so many times: red official hat with a peacock plume, long white beard, a Qing court robe embroidered with golden dragons — a face that never has to pretend to be anyone else, you get it at a glance. He sits in a warm-gold Qing boudoir — red lanterns, blue-and-white porcelain, draped silk daybeds — where the sheer opulence is itself the word "want." The list starts adding lines: Princess Jianning, lounging on cushions, tosses him "use your most powerful move," and hand on chin — item one — "I want it." The twins, Big Shuang'er and Little Shuang'er, come in side by side: "two isn't enough" — add another. Three, four, five; the frame cuts to four women around a daybed, then a group of five, the appetite fed larger and larger. The list's last line: ringed by admirers on a golden throne, arms flung wide — "I want them ALL." That escalating chain of lines is the gacha collect-loop itself. The end card signs him "Oboi — Elvis Tsui," and the black smartphone in his hand — the one modern object in a room full of Qing court — is where this whole wishlist finally checks out.
# 概念文案 v7 · Part 3（13–17）

> v7 原則：v3 文氣 × v6 可讀性；每部不同架構；只講光影/場景/鏡頭/色彩等實詞，不打部門名；只寫畫面可見，不編製作軼事。

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版_完整版（說明欄核實代言人：Selina任家萱、任容萱姊妹），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel, full cut (endorsers confirmed via video description: sisters Selina Jen and Lorene Jen) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《新仙俠：起源》執導廣告，由 Selina 任家萱與任容萱姊妹代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Xin Xianxia: Qiyuan, featuring sisters Selina Jen and Lorene Jen.
works.concept_zh: 真的感情演不了假——所以我找來一對真正的雙生姊妹：任家萱 Selina 和任容萱。她們在現實裡就是彼此的靠山，這份感情不用教、不用演，開機那天就已經在場了。所以整支片其實只做一件事：讓真實的姊妹情，長成一則跨越古今的仙俠寓言。我把她們拆進三個世界。古裝那條線是華麗的閨房，花鳥屏風、木格窗、圓鏡幔帳，暖橘的燭火撞上冷藍的月光；現代那條線是一間溫馨的家，兒時臥房裡的大熊玩偶、綠檯燈，一路暖黃；再疊一層仙俠奇觀——月夜山水、藍色巨獸破海，冷到發紫。我用光的溫度把兩條時間線縫在一起，用一重又一重的框——圓月洞門、圓鏡、窗格——把兩個時空反覆疊在同一格畫面裡，疊到你分不清誰是誰的前世。最後，長大的兩姊妹一古一今並肩站進同一個暖房間，相視而笑。找對了人，「羈絆跨越古今」這句話就不必演——它本來就是真的。
works.concept_en: Real feeling can't be faked — so I found a real pair of twin sisters: Selina Jen and 任容萱. In life they already are each other's anchor; that bond needs no coaching and no acting — it was in the room the day we rolled. So the whole film really does just one thing: let a real sisterhood grow into a myth that spans past and present. I split them across three worlds. The wuxia line is an ornate boudoir — painted bird-and-flower screens, latticed windows, a round mirror, a canopy bed — warm candle flame colliding with cold moonlight. The modern line is a cozy home — the childhood bedroom's giant teddy, a green lamp — kept in warm yellow throughout. Over both I layer a wuxia spectacle: a moonlit landscape, a blue leviathan breaking the sea, cold enough to turn violet. I stitch the two timelines together with the temperature of the light, and with frame inside frame — a moon-gate arch, a round mirror, window lattice — laying the two eras over each other in one image until you can't tell whose past life is whose. At the end, the grown sisters — one in ancient robes, one in modern dress — step side by side into the same warm room and smile. Cast the right people, and "a bond that crosses time" doesn't need acting. It simply is.

works.views_note: 官方頻道廣告篇累積 195,193 觀看；本片為主題曲 MV〈第一虛〉
works.views_note_en: 195,193 views accumulated on the official channel's ad cuts; this featured cut is the theme song MV "The First Void"
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《斬妖》執導事前預約廣告，由陳漢典代言。
works.desc_en: Directed a pre-registration campaign ad for the mobile game Zhan Yao, featuring endorser Hank Chen.
works.concept_zh: 我想試一件事：一個諧音哏，到底能撐起多大的東西。所以先把哏做到最尷尬也最好笑——陳漢典 Hank Chen 演的「空虛公子」，搖著一把寫「空虛」的團扇，在滿園櫻花裡自封天下第一，下一秒被身旁婢女當眾拆穿：「你不是空虛，是腎虛。」鏡頭由下往上仰著他，把那份自我感覺良好撐到最滿，再一秒戳破；江南庭園愈是乾淨講究，他出的糗就愈響。這哏要是只活在一支廣告裡，就太小看它了。於是它長成一整首歌〈第一虛〉，彩色荒誕喜劇和顆粒黑白復古片段交錯剪，副歌一遍遍唱「腎虛空虛」；連潑墨字卡都特意把那個「腎」字挑成紅的，讓你一眼接住笑點。直到片尾才揭曉真正的底牌——「斬妖×西遊」，收在水墨山嵐的片名卡上。一個諧音哏，長出一支廣告、一首主題曲、一次 IP 聯動：這才是這個案子真正的體量。
works.concept_en: I wanted to test one thing: how big a thing can a single pun hold up? So first I made the gag as excruciating as it is funny — Hank Chen's "Young Master Void," waving a round fan that reads "Void," crowning himself number one under heaven in a courtyard of cherry blossom, only to be publicly deflated a beat later by a maidservant: "You're not Void, you're Kidney-Deficient." The lens sits low and tilts up at him, inflating his smugness to the brim before puncturing it a second later; the more spotless and refined the Jiangnan garden, the louder his humiliation lands. To let the gag live inside a single commercial would be to underestimate it. So it grows into a whole song, "The First Void," cutting color-graded absurd comedy against grainy black-and-white retro segments, the chorus looping "kidney-void, empty-void"; even the ink-splatter title cards pick the word "Kidney" out in red so you catch the joke at a glance. Only at the very end does the real card turn over — Zhanyao × Journey to the West — landing on an ink-wash mountain title. One pun, grown into an ad, a theme song, and an IP crossover: that's the true size of this job.

works.views_display_zh: 官方頻道系列合計 9.9萬+觀看
works.views_note: 官方頻道 4 支（宣傳MV+多慧小劇場×2+賺翻篇）合計 99,793 觀看；此為導演版存檔
works.views_note_en: Four cuts on the game's official channel total 99,793 views; this player shows the director's archived cut
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《玩賺大都會》執導廣告，由李多慧代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Wan Zhuan Da Du Hui, featuring endorser Lee Da-hye.
works.concept_zh: 一塊看板能放多大？大到變成一整棟大樓——這支片的尺度就從這裡量起。李多慧 Lee Da-hye 在遊戲裡一人能活出好幾種人生，我就讓她的每一個分身都膨脹成一座城市地標。開場我先把她三種造型——辦公室女強人、啦啦隊、居家捲髮——平躺在沙灘巾上排排比，像貨架上的商品讓你一次挑；鏡頭一仰，分身就一個個放大成天際線上的巨幅看板，啦啦隊版佔滿整片時代廣場式的螢幕牆，創業套裝版和「多慧」的名字並列在另一棟樓上。尺度還要再往上加：高潮是一面會向現實下鈔票雨的立體看板，她乾脆從螢幕裡走出來，站在復古街景裡一張張數錢，薄荷綠的老爺車、霓虹、戴著狗頭套坐辦公桌的加班狗——整座城市都被捲進這場鬧劇。分身數就等於人生數，賣點全長在畫面的尺寸裡，一句話都不必解釋。
works.concept_en: How big can one billboard get? Big enough to become a whole building — that's the scale this film measures from. In the game, Lee Da-hye can live several lives at once, so I let every alter ego of hers swell into a city landmark. It opens with her three looks — girlboss office worker, cheerleader, curler-haired homebody — laid flat on beach towels side by side, like products on a shelf you pick from at a glance. The lens tilts up, and one by one each persona blows up into a giant billboard on the skyline: the cheerleader fills a whole Times-Square-style screen wall, the startup-suit version stands beside her name "多慧" on another tower. Then the scale climbs again: the climax is an anamorphic billboard raining cash into the real world, so she just steps out of the screen and stands in a retro streetscape counting bills one by one — a mint-green classic car, neon, an "overwork dog" in a dog-head mask at his desk — the whole city swept into the farce. Personas equal lives, and the entire pitch lives in the sheer size of the image. Not a line of it needs explaining.

works.views_note: 本篇單支影片 10.2萬觀看；同系列「震撼登場」全 8 支官方影片合計超過 290 萬觀看
works.views_note_en: This single cut has drawn 102K views; the full "Shocking Debut" series of 8 official videos has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views
works.desc_zh: 為國際大作《失落的方舟》（Amazon Games）執導廣告，官方系列影片合計觀看數超過 290 萬。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the major title Lost Ark (Amazon Games); the official campaign series has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views.
works.concept_zh: 這支片我做了一個有點冒險的決定：全片不放任何一張明星臉。沒有代言人可以借力，就等於逼自己證明一件事——這款遊戲光靠夠暗、夠有戲，就賣得動。既然賭氛圍，我就只留紅與黑兩個顏色。一名尖刺黑甲的斗篷女戰士從灰霧裡浮出來，四周的紅燭把她的臉削成一道剪影，身後的煙聚成惡魔的臉，血月頂在林梢，一圈血色的漩渦從上方把她俯捲下去。滲血的樹幹、紅燭排成的儀式陣、甲冑上那層暗紅的光，每一樣都往「墮落」推，把「走進黑暗」拍成一個緩慢而確定的過程，一句台詞都不給。等這股氛圍鋪滿了，片子才亮出收尾：一整排七個職業的選角卡展開，配上「選擇你的命運吧」，把原本只是在旁邊看戲的你，點名拉下場當玩家；最後落在焦土上燒著浮起的「失落的方舟」片名。先用氛圍把你鎮住，再叫你的名字。
works.concept_en: For this one I made a slightly reckless call: not a single star's face in the whole film. With no celebrity to lean on, I was forcing myself to prove one thing — that this game sells on nothing but how dark, how dramatic it is. Betting everything on mood, I kept only two colors: red and black. A spike-armored, cloaked warrior woman rises out of grey mist; red candles pare her face down to a silhouette; behind her the smoke gathers into a demon's face, a blood moon crowns the treeline, and a crimson spiral swallows her from above. Blood-weeping trunks, a ritual ring of red candles, the dull-red glow on her armor — every element pushed toward the fall, turning "the descent into darkness" into one slow, certain process, with not a line of dialogue. Only once that mood is full does the film play its closer: a row of seven class-select cards fans open under one line, "Choose your fate," calling the viewer who was only watching down onto the field as the player. It lands on the title "Lost Ark," burning up through scorched earth. Pin you with atmosphere first — then call your name.

works.desc_zh: 為遊戲《慶餘年》執導廣告，由蕭煌奇代言。
works.desc_en: Directed the commercial for the game Qing Yu Nian, featuring endorser 蕭煌奇.
works.concept_zh:
這支案子從選角就定了調：我要一個真正看不見的人，演「看不見、卻什麼都看得見」的劍客——盲人歌手蕭煌奇，飾矇眼劍客。要把「看不見」從弱點翻成武功，我用兩支情緒相反的片講同一件事，軸就藏在兩句台詞裡：「我看某」對上「我看得見」。

客棧篇走喜。竹林裡的夜間客棧，木格窗、紅燈籠、酒招，粗布壯漢掀桌、扛梁、飛踢，地上還擺一隻慢吞吞的烏龜埋荒謬。全場亂成一團，戴黑墨鏡的蕭煌奇卻穩穩坐在畫面左側桌邊，一動不動；光頭反派撂下「這是我的地盤」，他只回一句台語「我看某」——所有人都在動、只有他不動，這反差就是笑點引擎。

變身篇把情緒翻過來，走燃。開場是紅西裝、墨鏡、摩天大樓前的現代蕭煌奇；藍色靈氣把他捲起，都市在藍焰裡碎掉，光散開時他已站在滿月下的古城廢墟，矇眼布條、背著長劍。一句「我看得見」的字卡，正好把客棧篇的「我看某」狠狠反轉——看不見的人，在這世界才真正看得見。最後他和另一位矇眼的心眼俠客五竹背靠背站定，各自握劍在手。兩支片只做一件事：把他「看不見」這件真事，變成整個武俠世界最厲害的「看得見」。
works.concept_en:
This job set its tone at casting: I wanted a man who genuinely cannot see, to play a swordsman who "cannot see, yet sees everything" — so I brought in the blind singer 蕭煌奇 as the film's blindfolded swordsman. To flip "blindness" from weakness into a martial art, I told the same idea in two films of opposite emotion, and the whole reversal hangs on two lines: "I can't see" against "I can see."

The Inn cut is comedy. A night inn in a bamboo grove — latticed windows, red lanterns, a hand-painted wine sign — where rough-cloth brawlers flip tables, hoist beams and fly-kick, with a slow tortoise on the floor to seed the absurd. As the whole place erupts, 蕭煌奇 sits at a table on the left in black shades, utterly still; the bald villain snarls "This is my turf," and he only answers, in Taiwanese, "I can't see." Everyone moves, he alone doesn't — that contrast is the film's comic engine.

The Transformation cut flips the emotion to full blood. It opens on a modern 蕭煌奇 — red suit, shades, a skyline of towers behind him; then a blue spirit-energy wraps him whole, the city shattering in blue flame, and as the light clears he stands in a moonlit ruined city, blindfold on, long sword on his back. One title — "I can see" — turns the Inn's "I can't see" hard on its head: the man who cannot see is the one who truly sees in this world. At last he and another blindfolded swordsman, 五竹, set back to back, each sword in hand. One comic, one blazing — the two films really do just one thing: turn the true fact that he cannot see into the greatest "seeing" in the whole martial world.
